assertions.description: 12 test points (J5016-J5027 region, Conn_01x01_Socket) are correctly classified as type='test_point' and appear in test_coverage with covered_nets listing M_COL1, M_COL1_L, M_COL2, M_COL2_L, M_COL3, etc. This is accurate: the test pads are placed on key matrix column lines.

Four I2C bus entries are correctly detected: SDA/SCL for U1 (right half RP2040) with R103/R104 (4.7k to +3.3V), and SDA_L/SCL_L for U5002 (left half RP2040) with R5013/R5014 (4.7k to +3V3_L). All pull-up values, rail associations, and devices are accurate.
